archive_data.question_text: Which of the following players is associated with para-badminton?

explanation.english: Krishna Nagar is an Indian para-badminton player who won the gold medal in the men's singles SH6 event at the 2020 Tokyo Paralympics. Sumit Antil is a para-athlete (javelin throw), Manish Narwal is a shooter, and Avani Lekhara is also a shooter.
explanation.tanglish: Krishna Nagar oru Indian para-badminton player. Avaru 2020 Tokyo Paralympics-le men's singles SH6 event-le gold medal adicharu. Sumit Antil para-athlete (javelin throw), Manish Narwal shooter, Avani Lekhara-um shooter.

archive_data.question_text: According to the Census of India 2011, which is the second most literate state in India?

explanation.english: According to the Census of India 2011, Kerala is the most literate state with 93.91% literacy rate, followed by Mizoram with 91.58% literacy rate making it the second most literate state.
explanation.tanglish: India Census 2011 prakaram, Kerala dhan 93.91% literacy rate-oda first place-le iruku. Adhukku apparam Mizoram 91.58%-oda second place-le iruku.

archive_data.question_text: Sitara Devi was a ________ dancer of India.

explanation.english: Sitara Devi (1920-2014) was a renowned Indian classical dancer known for her mastery in Kathak dance form. She was awarded the Padma Shri in 1973 and is often referred to as the 'Queen of Kathak'.
explanation.tanglish: Sitara Devi (1920-2014) oru legendary Indian classical dancer. Avaru Kathak dance-le praveenam aanavar. 1973-le Padma Shri award kuduthurukanga, avarukku 'Queen of Kathak' nu perum undu.

archive_data.question_text: Avani Lekhara is associated with which of the following sports?

explanation.english: Avani Lekhara is an Indian Paralympic shooter who won the gold medal in the Women's 10m Air Rifle Standing SH1 event at the 2020 Summer Paralympics, becoming the first Indian woman to win a Paralympic gold medal.
explanation.tanglish: Avani Lekhara oru Indian Paralympic shooter. Avaru 2020 Summer Paralympics-le Women's 10m Air Rifle Standing SH1 event-le gold medal adicharu. India-oda first woman Paralympic gold medalist dhan ivar.

archive_data.question_text: Which of the following Articles are related to Right Against Exploitation?

explanation.english: Articles 23 and 24 of the Indian Constitution deal with the Right Against Exploitation. Article 23 prohibits traffic in human beings and forced labor, while Article 24 prohibits employment of children below 14 years of age in hazardous industries.
explanation.tanglish: Indian Constitution-le Articles 23-24 dhan Right Against Exploitation pathi solluthu. Article 23 human trafficking and forced labor-ai stop panradhu pathi solluthu. Article 24 14 vayasu keezha irukkum kulanthaihalai dangerous factories-le velai seiya vida koodadhu-nu solluthu.

archive_data.question_text: In 8th century India, Nagabhatta I established which of the following Rajput dynasties in Malwa region?

explanation.english: Nagabhatta I was the founder of the Gurjara-Pratihara dynasty in the 8th century. He ruled over the Malwa region and successfully defended his kingdom against Arab invasions.
explanation.tanglish: Nagabhatta I dhan 8th century-le Gurjara-Pratihara dynasty-a malwa region-le aarambichavar. Avaru Arab invasions-le irundhu avvaru kingdom-ai kaakka senjaru.

archive_data.question_text: In which of the following years was the Election Commission of India established?

explanation.english: The Election Commission of India was established on 25th January 1950 under the Constitution of India. It is a permanent constitutional body responsible for conducting free and fair elections in India.
explanation.tanglish: Election Commission of India January 25, 1950-na Indian Constitution-keezha uruvakkappattadhu. India-le free and fair elections nadathikkaradhu dhan ivanga main velaye.
